metadata.description: Claude skills for Dynamicweb 10 — organized by task domain, bundled by role.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-setup
plugins.description: Skills for bootstrapping Dynamicweb 10 solutions — installation, configuration, and upgrades.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-frontend
plugins.description: Skills for template and storefront developers — rendering (Razor, ViewModels, TemplateTags), content, Swift, and headless delivery.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-commerce
plugins.description: Skills for commerce and PIM implementers — products, catalogs, orders, B2B, search, and user management.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-backend
plugins.description: Skills for backend and platform engineers — C# API, providers, scheduled tasks, MCP tools, integrations, and data access.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-developer
plugins.description: Developer tools for Dynamicweb 10 platform engineering.

plugins.name: dynamicweb-presales
plugins.description: Skills for presales and demo engineers running Dynamicweb 10 demos. The skills are the substrate; the build is driven by a swappable orchestrator (GSD primary, or the native /demo:* command set) — see dw-demo-base/references/orchestrator.md.
